title: teijsmanniodendron holophyllum
intro: Teijsmanniodendron holophyllum, also known as the Java copal tree, is a plant species native to Indonesia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Teijsmanniodendron holophyllum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Teijsmanniodendron holophyllum include infusions, decoctions, and essential oil extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
